]

]

]

    base:desc "Kalman filtering for object trajectory tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetpack5_0SDK, Python3_8
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 middleware for inter-component communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack5_0SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for GPU-accelerated processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance Python3_8 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 programming language for software development"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ programming language for software development"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for simulation and modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for structured data storage and reporting capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance OPCUA : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OPC Unified Architecture for data collection and device control"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks via UI, alongside data saving and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualization, DataSaving, ReportGeneration
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading of ACC system's lead vehicle detection, speed calculation based on distance to lead vehicle, and actuation commands to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetection, SpeedCalculation, SendActuationCommands
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable ACC, set desired speeds, and send emergency braking commands through UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableDisableACC, SetDesiredSpeed, SendEmergencyBraking
]

    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks"
]

    base:desc "Saving of data for later use"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ReportGeneration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generation of reports from stored data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LeadVehicleDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of lead vehicle for ACC system"
]

instance SpeedCalculation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calculation of speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
]

instance SendActuationCommands : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sending of actuation commands to the vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableDisableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enabling or disabling the Adaptive Cruise Control subsystem"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Setting the desired speed for the ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SendEmergencyBraking : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sending emergency braking command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, MotorActuator, LowerLevelChassisControl, PointCloudClusteringTrackingComponent
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DBSCANModel, KalmanFilterModel, SQLDatabase, ROS2Middleware, NVIDIAJetpack5_0SDK, Python3_8, CPlusPlus, MATLABSimulink, OPCUA
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains 3DVisualization, ControlPanel
]

instance 3DVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D Visualization component for real-time visualization of vehicle state and object tracks"
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control Panel component for remote management of ACC"
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking software component that processes raw LiDAR data and generates object tracks"
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator that converts desired speed into motor voltage commands"
]

instance LowerLevelChassisControl : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lower level chassis control component that manages steering and speed of the vehicle"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for Motor Actuation and Steering Servo Actuation are generated by the ACC Controlling FE and Control Panel User Interface FE. The Data Translation component processes these commands through serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversions. Communication between software components uses ROS2, and inter-entity communication uses UDP over Wi-Fi."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for computation offloading in safety-critical vehicular applications, as mandated by industry standards, with hardware limitations necessitating this specific timing constraint."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system follows ISO 23247 RA architecture, mapping software components to Functional Entities (FEs) implemented as ROS2 packages. Each entity (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User) is deployed on distinct hardware, with coordination mechanisms including 100 ms clock synchronization for vehicular safety. The Physical Twin Entity extends beyond ISO 23247's OME by hosting resource-specific automotive functions."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The network infrastructure uses ROS2 for internal software component communication and UDP over Wi-Fi for inter-entity transmission. The system enforces a maximum network latency of 100 ms, with each entity deployed on separate hardware components forming a distributed topology."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Each Functional Entity (FE) is implemented as an individual ROS2 package and deployed on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano hardware platforms, with each entity hosted on distinct hardware components to ensure dedicated resource allocation."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247-2:2021 Reference Architecture, which defines entity-based structure including Observable Manufacturing Element (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity; OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) is referenced as an implementation example for Data Collection and Device Control Entity to ensure interoperability."
]
